properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are my joy, You are my song You are the well, the One I'm drawing from You are my refuge, my whole life long Where else would I go?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Surely my God is the strength of my soul Your love defends me, Your love defends me And when I feel like I'm all alone Your love defends me, Your love defends me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Day after day, night after night I will remember, You're with me in this fight Although the battle, it rages on The war already won I know the war is already won

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We sing Hallelujah You're my portion My salvation Hallelujah

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Surely my God is the strength of my soul Your love defends me, Your love defends me And when I feel like I'm all alone Your love defends me, Your love defends me Surely my God is the strength of my soul Your love defends me, Your love defends me And when I feel like I'm all alone Your love defends me, Your love defends me

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We sing Hallelujah You're my portion My salvation Hallelujah You're my portion My salvation

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Hallelujah You're my portion My salvation
